assumptions: finite or explicitly regularised state space
periodic boundary condition declared before simulation
unitarity and periodicity are testable operator properties
retrocausal interpretation remains boundary-only without external evidence
executable_validation_targets: verify operator unitarity on a finite declared Hilbert space
measure cycle-closure residual after one T_MMC period
record periodicity failure as falsifying this computational boundary model
null_controls: boundary-only claim label until periodicity data and falsifiers exist
identity-period control must close with zero residual
non-unitary operator control must be rejected before interpretation
specs.section_path: Structural Overview (by Domain) > Computational Unifier. > 1. The Cyclic Operator and Reversibility
validation_targets: cycle-closure residual for O_MMC over one declared period
identity-period and non-unitary operator null controls

assumptions: projectors form a complete orthogonal resolution of identity
retrocausal interpretation remains boundary-only without external evidence
executable_validation_targets: verify ABL probability normalisation over complete projectors
recover Born-rule probabilities under trivial post-selection
record denominator failure and non-projector inputs as invalid specs
specs.section_path: Structural Overview (by Domain) > Computational Unifier. > 3. Retrocausality via the Two-State Vector Formalism (TSVF)

assumptions: entropy rates are measured on a shared time base
local entropy reduction is paired with explicit information-processing cost
mutual information estimator and units are declared
GSL claims require non-negative total entropy-rate evidence
executable_validation_targets: estimate thermodynamic and information entropy rates on a shared grid
scan mutual information against measured negentropy rate
verify total entropy-rate non-negativity under explicit Landauer cost
null_controls: Landauer lower-bound violation must fail the validation
negative total entropy-rate budget rejects GSL claim promotion
specs.section_path: Structural Overview (by Domain) > Computational Unifier. > II. The Thermodynamics of Consciousness: Negentropy and Information
validation_targets: mutual information versus negentropy proportionality scan

variables.I_Psi_B: mutual information between Psi channel and biological substrate
variables.N_Psi: negentropy injection rate attributed to the modelled field channel

summary.policy: EQ0115-EQ0118 anchors are promoted only into validation specifications. Temporal-boundary and retrocausal interpretations remain boundary-only until operator, probability, entropy-budget, and falsification controls pass.
